steps.title: Identify the claim the blank must support
steps.content: The passage argues that while 21st-century technology makes locating hoards easier, “plenty of hoards were found earlier.” The blank must provide evidence of hoards discovered before this modern technological era. This is the decisive signal.

steps.title: Find evidence of early discoveries
steps.content:
The matching choice provides the Ardagh Hoard (1868) and Balline Hoard (1940)—two discoveries well before the 21st century that directly support the passage's claim.

  • Choice B misstates discovery dates by wrongly placing Carrick-on-Suir in the 1900s when it was found in 2013.
  • Choice C falsely assigns 1868 to Balline.
  • Choice D includes a 2013 discovery that contradicts the “earlier” argument.


A is correct.
